name: Hamburger Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the hamburger and cornstarch together.
2. Gradually add the hot milk while stirring continuously.
3. Mix in the chopped green onions and mayonnaise.
4. Add the beaten eggs, grated Swiss cheese, grated cheddar cheese, salt, and pepper to taste.
5. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
6. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 40 minutes.
